Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Magic
Fleeting Waystone (Tier 15) of Smothering
--------
Revives Available: 4 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +15% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +45% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 12(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 39(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
